config.script:
sub plug_problem_podstawowe(byref pContainer,byval id)
dim elem
dim pProblem : set pProblem = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5BWINFO,id)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Tytuł").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext(pProblem.strTytul)
if pProblem.listProdukt.exists(1) then
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Dotyczy").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_TABLE , -1
dim pTB_dotyczy:set pTB_dotyczy = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pTB.element) for each elem in pProblem.listProdukt pTB_dotyczy.newrow.newcell.addtexthli elem.wpProdGrupa.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(elem.wpProdGrupa.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(elem.wpProdGrupa.idobj)+"'") next
end if
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Objawy").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext(pProblem.strObjaw)
if pProblem.listObjawyZal.exists(1) then
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Załaczniki do objawów").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_TABLE , -1
dim pTB_objawy_zal:set pTB_objawy_zal = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pTB.element) for each elem in pProblem.listObjawyZal pTB_objawy_zal.newrow.newcell.addtexthli elem.wrefZal.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(elem.wrefZal.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(elem.wrefZal.idobj)+"'") next
end if
end sub
sub plug_problem_rozwiazanie(byref pContainer,byval id)
dim elem
dim pProblem : set pProblem = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5BWINFO,id)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Rozwiązanie").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext(pProblem.strRozwiazanie)
if pProblem.listRozwiazanieZal.exists(1) then
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Załaczniki do rozwiązania").element.bold = true pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_TABLE , -1 'pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
dim pTB_rozw_zal:set pTB_rozw_zal = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pTB.element) for each elem in pProblem.listRozwiazanieZal pTB_rozw_zal.newrow.newcell.addtexthli elem.wrefZal.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(elem.wrefZal.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(elem.wrefZal.idobj)+"'") next
end if
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Uwagi").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext(pProblem.strUwagi)
if pProblem.listUwagiZal.exists(1) then
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Załaczniki do uwag").element.bold = true pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_TABLE , -1 'pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
dim pTB_uwagi_zal:set pTB_uwagi_zal = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pTB.element) for each elem in pProblem.listUwagiZal pTB_uwagi_zal.newrow.newcell.addtexthli elem.wrefZal.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(elem.wrefZal.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(elem.wrefZal.idobj)+"'") next
end if
end sub
